products.name: Rider Experience

interfaces.name: iOS App
interfaces.description: Mobile rider workspace for enrollment, order tracking, documents, support, and claims.

interfaces.name: Android App
interfaces.description: Android rider workspace aligned with the iOS lifecycle and service features.

interfaces.name: Rider Web Experience
interfaces.description: Responsive web flow for browsing, quoting, and completing rider actions where native apps are not required.

interfaces.name: Lifecycle Notifications
interfaces.description: Email, SMS, and push notifications for order milestones, service events, and contract changes.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Helps riders choose the right bike and accessories with low decision friction.
